tagline: Starting in Siliguri, built for India

common.errorLoading: Could not load. Check your connection.

home.subtitle: Verified help for parents, caregivers and neighbours, starting in Siliguri.
home.heroTitle: One companion layer for care, services and follow-up.
home.heroBody: Start with verified local providers, call instead of typing, save proof, and keep distant family in the loop.
home.opsVerifyBody: Phone checks, source links and service-area clarity before a listing becomes trusted.
home.opsCoordinateBody: Call, WhatsApp, save and share the same service record with family.
home.opsEscalateBody: Route urgent needs toward helplines, local providers and family contacts.
home.railsTitle: Public rails we should guide people toward
home.railsBody: Elderline, eSanjeevani, UMANG, CSCs, Yatri Sathi and Sanchar Saathi are trust anchors, not competitors.
home.mobileHelpBody: Call 112 or open direct emergency lines.
home.needHelpBody: Call 112 first for danger, then request Saathi callback coordination if needed.
home.elderBody: Find or arrange a safe, caring home for your parents — with shelter, meals and attendants.
home.trustBanner: Every strong listing should show who verified it, where the source came from, and how to call first.
home.metricCities: Launch city now, repeatable city playbook next
home.metricProviders: Verified local providers, public rails and family notes in one place
home.metricResponse: Call-first flows for elders who should not have to fight forms
home.proofTitle: Designed like a service layer, not a listings dump
home.proofBody: Saathi should feel like someone accountable is coordinating the next step: who to call, what is verified, what public rail helps, and how family can follow along.
home.journeyFindBody: Shortlist trusted local help by city and need.
home.journeyConfirmBody: Call, check the source and save the record.
home.journeyFollowBody: Share status with family and reuse what worked.
home.scaleTitle: Siliguri is the first proof, not the boundary
home.scaleBody: The interface is city-aware so the same trust system can expand into nearby and underserved Indian cities without losing local context.

services.title: Services
services.searchScope: Searches only the verified services listed inside Saathi - not the whole internet.
services.unverified: Unverified — please confirm details before relying on them
services.directoryBody: Search trusted Siliguri listings, then call or save the ones your family may need again.
services.careNote: Save this provider so a family member can reuse the same record.

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.heroBody: Ask in plain language. Saathi reads the request, checks verified services, prepares the safest next action, and keeps family follow-up ready.
assistant.welcome: Tell me what needs to happen. I can find the right Saathi listing, prepare the call, and help your family follow up.
assistant.placeholder: Example: Book a cardiology appointment tomorrow morning for my father.
assistant.simpleWelcome: Hi, I am Saathi. Tell me what you need help with and I will find the next step.
assistant.imageAssistantPrompt: Please look at this image and help.
assistant.safetyDisclaimer: Saathi helps coordinate calls and next steps. It is not a medical device, doctor or emergency responder.
assistant.thinking: Checking services and preparing the next step...
assistant.detailPrompt: Patient name, age, concern, preferred date/time, and callback phone:

examples.doctor: Book a doctor appointment tomorrow morning for my father.
examples.medicine: Find a pharmacy that can help with prescription medicine delivery.
examples.travel: Help arrange transport to the hospital this evening.

assistant.approve: Tap a button below to approve
assistant.voiceHint: Tap Speak and say what you need
assistant.addedToCalendar: Added to your calendar. See the My Calendar page.
assistant.welcomeBack: Welcome back. I remember our earlier chats — tell me what you need today.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Moderated local Q&A for Siliguri families. Questions are reviewed before they appear publicly.
community.reviewNotice: For the pilot, posts go through Saathi review before appearing. Do not share urgent medical details here.
community.submittedForReview: Thanks. Your question was sent for review.
community.noReplies: No replies yet. Be the first to help.
community.signInToPost: Please sign in to post or reply.

help.title: SOS & Emergency
help.subtitle: For immediate danger, call 112 first. Saathi can help coordinate a callback and next steps after the urgent call is made.
help.emergencyHint: 112 connects police, fire, rescue and health emergency response in India.
help.directLinesBody: Use these when you know the exact service. If unsure, use 112.
help.helpDeskBody: For non-immediate coordination, request or call the Saathi help desk when staffed.
help.submitted: Thank you. Your callback request has been saved for the Saathi team.
help.languages: Hindi & English support planned for the pilot
help.callbackError: Could not save the callback request. Please call the help desk directly.
help.privacyBody: Review what Saathi collects, how callback requests are used, and how to request deletion.

privacy.title: Privacy and consent
privacy.intro: Saathi should collect only what is needed to coordinate trusted local help.
privacy.dataBody: Account details, callback request details, saved services, community submissions, and assistant planning logs may be used to provide support, safety review and abuse prevention.
privacy.consentBody: Pilot users should be able to withdraw consent or request correction/deletion by contacting Saathi support. Do not submit another person's sensitive medical details unless you have permission.
privacy.medicalBody: Saathi is not a doctor, medical device or emergency responder. It does not diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any condition.
privacy.grievanceBody: Set a real India grievance/contact address before public launch. Until then, treat this screen as the product placeholder for the pilot compliance workflow.

admin.title: City Admin
admin.subtitle: Manage announcements and services for your city
admin.notAdmin: This area is for city admins only.
admin.signInFirst: Sign in with an admin account to continue.
admin.helperSubtitle: Add places and services, and send announcements for your city
admin.helperHint: Helpers can add places, services and announcements for this city.
admin.portalBody: You can add places, services and announcements for your city.

calendar.title: My Calendar
calendar.empty: No events yet. Ask Saathi to plan something, or add one below.

voice.notSupported: Voice input is not supported on this device. Please type instead.
voice.error: Could not hear you. Try again.

pay.upiHint: Opens Google Pay, PhonePe or any UPI app.
pay.webFallback: On this device, open your UPI app and pay to:

auth.phoneUsernameHint: Your username will be created from your name automatically.
